'''yafaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enarch|enarch]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enarch|enarch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yafaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæfæyæth|yæfæyæth]] || [[word:yæfæyæj|yæfæyæj]] || [[word:yæfæyæsh|yæfæyæsh]] || [[word:yæfæyæ|yæfæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yafafayath|yafafayath]] || [[word:yafafayaj|yafafayaj]] || [[word:yafafayash|yafafayash]] || [[word:yafafaya|yafafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yafayath|yafayath]] || [[word:yafayaj|yafayaj]] || [[word:yafayash|yafayash]] || [[word:yafaya|yafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yafafyath|yafafyath]] || [[word:yafafyaj|yafafyaj]] || [[word:yafafyash|yafafyash]] || [[word:yafafyaf|yafafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yafayatha|yafayatha]] || [[word:yafayaja|yafayaja]] || [[word:yafayasha|yafayasha]] || [[word:yafayaka|yafayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yafayath|yafayath]] || [[word:yafayaj|yafayaj]] || [[word:yafayash|yafayash]] || [[word:yafaya|yafaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yafayathal|yafayathal]] || [[word:yafayajal|yafayajal]] || [[word:yafayashal|yafayashal]] || [[word:yafayakal|yafayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yafayathatha|yafayathatha]] || [[word:yafayajaja|yafayajaja]] || [[word:yafayashasha|yafayashasha]] || [[word:yafayaka|yafayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yafayathan|yafayathan]] || [[word:yafayajan|yafayajan]] || [[word:yafayashan|yafayashan]] || [[word:yafayakan|yafayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yafayathaoro|yafayathaoro]] || [[word:yafayajaoro|yafayajaoro]] || [[word:yafayashaoro|yafayashaoro]] || [[word:yafayakaoro|yafayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
